scripts.dev: pnpm run generate && pnpm --filter @pl-conf/web run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run generate && pnpm --filter @pl-conf/web run build
scripts.build:lambdas: pnpm run generate && pnpm --filter @pl-conf/functions run build
scripts.build:all: pnpm run generate && pnpm --filter @pl-conf/web run build && pnpm --filter @pl-conf/functions run build
scripts.destroy:experiment: cd packages/cdk && pnpm exec cdk destroy -c stage=experiment --force
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run generate && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck && tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tests/tsconfig.json --noEmit
